author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(infiniteHits): correctly avoid writing to cache when dynamicWidgets has no facets in the results (#5669)
body:
* Revert "fix(infinite-hits): do not write cache with incomplete state caused by dynamic widgets (#5620)"

This reverts commit 30edccdaf0607695a6e621d7a71dd36f0f719d0b.

* test(infiniteHits): ensure case when no facets in results is covered

* fix(infiniteHits): use state instead of response

---------

Co-authored-by: Mirza Andriamanamisoa Marotsaha <andriamanamisoa@gmail.com>
